description.zh-CN: 已更新至 1.6.15 版本，专为在线合作与资深单人玩家打造。安装简便，自带配置选项。星露谷的故事将延伸至鹈鹕镇之外——本整合包在保留原版风味的基础上，新增了地点与内容，让你的农场生活更加丰富多彩。
description.source: Updated for 1.6.15. Built for online co-op play and experienced solo players. Easy install, includes configuration. The story of Stardew Valley extends outside of Pelican Town. This collection adds new locations and more while keeping a vanilla feel.
